basic_details.job_title: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital (SGMH Delhi) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 14 Junior Resident Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 30-07-2026 at the SGMH Delhi office with original documents and self-attested copies. In this article, you'll find the Junior Resident walk-in recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, walk-in venue and timing, documents required, and direct links to the official notification.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: 30 yrs for General (5 yrs relaxable for SC/ST, 3 yrs relaxable for OBC and 5 yrs extra relaxable for Persons with disabilities candidate)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for General candidates. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 5 years extra for Persons with Disabilities.

qualification.details: MBBS degree from a recognized University Registered with Delhi Medical Council (DMC) or have applied for registration in DMC on or before last date of submission of application form Completed compulsory rotatory internship on or after 30.07.2024 Have not completed one-year Junior Residency in any recognized institution/hospital including regular & Ad-hoc basis.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level: 10 Pay Scale: Rs. 56100-1,77,500/- per month Allowances: Admissible as per rules.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SGMH Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS degree from a recognized University Registered with Delhi Medical Council (DMC) or have applied for registration in DMC on or before last date of submission of application form Completed compulsory rotatory internship on or after 30.07.2024 Have not completed one-year Junior Residency in any recognized institution/hospital including regular & Ad-hoc basis.

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for General candidates. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 5 years extra for Persons with Disabilities.

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay Matrix Level: 10 Pay Scale: Rs. 56100-1,77,500/- per month Allowances: Admissible as per rules.

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident posts at SGMH Delhi is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Registration will close on the same day.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized University and be registered with the Delhi Medical Council (DMC) or have applied for registration.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years for General candidates, with relaxations applicable for SC/ST, OBC, and Persons with Disabilities.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies for the Junior Resident post at Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Resident post is as per the 7th CPC Pay Matrix level 10, ranging from Rs. 56,100 to Rs. 1,77,500/- per month, plus allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report directly to the venue on the specified date.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, DMC registration proof, and internship completion certificate.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates should have completed their compulsory rotatory internship on or after 30.07.2024 and should not have completed one year of Junior Residency previously.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the 4th Floor Conference Hall in the Administrative Block, SGMH Hospital, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should report for registration between 9 AM and 12 PM on the day of the interview. Entry will not be allowed after 12 PM.
